name: Salamander County Public Television
short_description: Become a professional thing-doer! Complete wacky assignments for Salamander County's local TV station, and solve the mystery of why nearly everyone in the county suddenly disappeared.
detailed_description:
Congrats on becoming the newest hire of Salamander County's public TV station! Unfortunately, everyone in the county suddenly disappeared, except for you, your boss, and another employee. The show must go on, so with your new job title of Professional Thing-Doer, it's up to you to do all of the activities that need to be filmed for the TV station. You should probably try and figure out why everyone disappeared in the first place, too.

Features

  • twenty-five (25) different minigames
  • bronze, silver, and gold medal targets for each minigame
  • pretty much everything's a stock photo
  • a funny story involving a mouse with really big legs
  • lots of dumb videos

reviews.review_text: It's good, fun, funny. A great "play one level a day" kind of game. Suprised the number of reviews is so low.

This was a BLAST to play. From the silly story, the absurd minigames, momorable characters, everything in the game being stock photos... I had a really fun time completing this one.
It is a short experience, but I much prefer something like this than an 80 hour game.
Who knew a game comprised of stock images and minigames would be so enjoyable?

silly little game made almost exclusively of stock photos. the minigames are enjoyably goofy, don't overstay their welcome, and are usually pretty fun to master for the gold medal and bonus objective. all of the characters are awesome; i especially love geoffrey and ember, but rich richardson, the mouse, and susan are also cool. just one slight complaint: i wish the game made it clear you could retry the minigames after beating it, since i restarted the game several times after accidentally moving onto the next day while trying to restart a minigame for the gold medal and bonus objective (only to then find out i could have gone back to all of them at the end instead of deleting my save file each time).

that's beans.
